overall.description: Gameplay footage from Warhammer 40,000: Space Marine 2 showing a Space Marine in blue power armor battling Tyranid aliens in a ruined gothic industrial city. The character engages in intense third-person combat using melee chainswords and ranged bolters against various sized alien creatures amidst burning wreckage, toxic green growth, and crumbling stone architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: ruined industrial courtyard with metal grating floor

agents.ego_description: engaging smaller tyranid creatures with melee chainsword attacks in open courtyard

tall stone wall with gothic architectural details
burning destroyed buildings with smoke rising
large fires burning in the background ruins

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a ruined industrial courtyard with metal grating floors and gothic stone walls. The Space Marine engages in close combat with smaller tyranid aliens, with blood effects and burning ruins visible in the background under an overcast smoky sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered position behind stone wall with ammunition crates

events.description: character takes cover behind stone wall and switches to ranged combat

agents.ego_description: taking cover behind wall and shooting at approaching tyranids with bolter

segments.scene_description: The character moves into a covered position behind a stone pillar with sandbags and ammunition crates. From this sheltered position, the character engages in ranged combat while the background ruins are temporarily occluded by the wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: open combat arena facing large tyranid boss

events.description: large tyranid carnifex emerges and engages in melee combat
heavy explosions and blood effects during intense melee exchange

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to open combat against a massive tyranid carnifex in a ruined plaza. The character circles the large creature amidst explosions and blood effects, with gothic cathedral ruins visible in the burning background.

scene_state.functional_zone: toxic biomass covered area with red ambient lighting

ally space marine arrives and joins the combat

notable_agents.action: ally space marine fighting tyranids with bolter and chainsword

entered.detail: dense green glowing tyranid biomass covering the ground and structures
friendly space marine in blue armor assisting in combat
large metal support pillars with gothic detailing

segments.scene_description: The character enters a section covered in dense green toxic tyranid biomass with red ambient lighting. An ally space marine joins the fight, and together they engage smaller tyranid creatures amidst industrial pillars and hanging red banners.

scene_state.functional_zone: final combat arena with toxic growth and large creature

events.description: large tyranid carnifex returns for final confrontation
intense melee combat with heavy blood spray and execution moves

agents.ego_description: engaging in final intense combat with large tyranid, using melee executions

notable_agents.action: large tyranid carnifex charging and attacking with massive claws

entered.detail: large tyranid boss creature re-entering combat

segments.scene_description: The final segment features an intense boss battle with the large tyranid carnifex returning for a confrontation. The character performs melee executions with heavy blood effects while explosions and fires illuminate the background ruins, with toxic growth still visible in the periphery.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a ruined gothic industrial city that transforms from a smoky courtyard into a toxic, alien-infested warzone. It begins in an industrial courtyard with metal grating and stone walls where the Space Marine engages smaller tyranids amidst burning ruins under an overcast sky. As the character seeks cover behind a stone pillar and sandbags for ranged combat, the scene then opens into a wide plaza for a chaotic confrontation with a massive carnifex against a backdrop of crumbling cathedrals. The environment shifts further as the camera moves into a section choked with dense green toxic biomass and red ambient lighting, where the character and an ally fight beneath hanging red banners. Finally, the shot culminates in a brutal melee execution of the returning carnifex, with explosions and fires illuminating the surrounding ruins and lingering toxic growth.
